title: rubus macrostachys
intro: Rubus macrostachys, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Rubus macrostachys typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, stems, or roots, which can be consumed orally or used topically to reap its benefits.
